meta.title: ICS Security Architecture
meta.description: 3 minutes of highlights from Dale Peterson's ICS Security Architecture session from the OnRamp. You can see all 10 videos, bonus videos, Q&A with fellow students and instructors, all on the OnRamp Online. It's the fastest way to get up to speed on ICS Security
